disclaimer: Assistive curated fixture for offline bootstrap. Not an official legal bulletin.

items.title: EU AI Act human oversight expectations for high-risk systems (curated note)
items.summary: Indicative summary of Art. 14-style human oversight themes for high-risk AI. Operators should review oversight measures, stop/override controls, and documentation. This is not legal advice.

items.title: Transparency duties when interacting with natural persons
items.summary: Curated note on transparency-style duties (Art. 50 themes): inform users they are interacting with an AI system where applicable, and label synthetic content where required. Assistive mapping only.

items.title: Data governance and training data quality themes under the AI Act
items.summary: Curated note on data governance, bias mitigation, and record-keeping themes relevant to training and validation data. Prefer UNCERTAIN impact until legal counsel reviews.

items.title: Annex III employment and worker management use cases (indicative)
items.summary: Indicative note on employment / HR screening use cases often associated with elevated obligation themes. Does not classify any system as high-risk automatically.

items.title: Cybersecurity and robustness expectations for high-risk AI
items.summary: Curated note on cybersecurity, accuracy, and robustness themes. Impact hints are UNCERTAIN and require human review before control status changes.
